# Supported Devices

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_supported_devices.py; do not edit manually. -->

This page is generated from the Rust source. The support matrix is derived from each backend's `supports_...` methods; model lists are derived from the make model enums.

Legend: ✅ means every backend subtype for that firmware type supports the function; 🟡 means support is mixed or conditional; ❌ means no backend subtype supports it.
